name: Bill
subject: sound familiar?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
| Super Tuesday In:
---
[ ](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22OC9wr3F9c6eDdsSpUVSxsoT_oIu_qcqqQogxr3C8jRX_yKGv_FJmptEiHPoMSSsA&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200218_frs&n=1)
Friend — Today President Trump pardoned former Illinois Gov. Rod Blagojevich, who was serving a 14-year sentence for soliciting bribes for political appointments.
**Does this behavior sound familiar to you?**
It should — and this stunt by Trump is just another attempt at normalizing his corrupt political behavior from the federal government down the local level.
The President of the United States should lead by example, but by accepting this behavior in his own administration and normalizing it for others, Trump is setting a dangerous precedent that could take decades to undo.
This makes our mission on Super Tuesday that much more critical. We cannot and should not let Trump get away with this — and our best shot at doing that is by beating him at the ballot box.
[**That's why I’m asking you to help us beat Trump on March 3rd by making a contribution in any amount to our Super Tuesday Victory Fund today.**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22OC9wr3F9c6eDdsSpUVSxsoT_oIu_qcqqQogxr3C8jRX_yKGv_FJmptEiHPoMSSsA&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200218_frs&n=2)
| [SUPER TUESDAY
VICTORY FUND →](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22OC9wr3F9c6eDdsSpUVSxsoT_oIu_qcqqQogxr3C8jRX_yKGv_FJmptEiHPoMSSsA&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200218_frs&n=3)
---
There’s so much at stake in this election, and we can’t afford to do anything less than leave it all out in the field. [**I hope you will help us do that by making a contribution today. →**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22OC9wr3F9c6eDdsSpUVSxsoT_oIu_qcqqQogxr3C8jRX_yKGv_FJmptEiHPoMSSsA&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200218_frs&n=4)
Thank you,
Bill
Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200218_frs&n=5).
You can also keep up with Team Weld on [Twitter](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEee0J3CzZBj8v0TKy2tYMM&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200218_frs&n=6) or [Facebook](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sD5mbawGI5P2loKSMnHaUPJQdagn1SdGMQUy6UvfZqO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200218_frs&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200218_frs&n=8), software for leaders.

Our opponent is a rubber stamp for President Trump, and he claims that the only credential he needs to represent Tennesseans in the Senate is Trump's endorsement.
_**We disagree.**_
This race is about representing Tennesseans -- not just one politician or their agenda.
James is in this race for us. He plans to work on behalf of Tennesseans -- not the Washington elite or special interests -- to improve access to health care, safeguard protections for pre-existing conditions, and fight for an economy that works for Tennessee's small businesses.
[_**If you believe Tennessee needs a leader who puts people over politics, then chip into our grassroots campaign today. ->**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa186/18d6a294/4cc0c5e8/26d622bc/1967874304/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDAyMTgiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200218?refcode=jme200218_m&recurring=true")
Thanks,
Team Mackler

|

There are 4 days left until the Nevada caucuses.

And that means there are 3 days left to meet our biggest fundraising goal yet.

We've done the math, and $7 million is what we need to invest in our critical on-the-ground organizing and advertising programs to remain competitive in this race.

So if you've been waiting for the right moment to chip in for the first time to our campaign for big, structural change -- now is the time. These next few days will help decide the future of this race, and Elizabeth is relying on her strongest supporters to help reach our goal.

**[Can you make your next contribution of $2, or whatever you can, right now to help reach our $7 million goal and power this campaign forward?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a9b1/45c30650/1ff040831/66e45b8a/48341103/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWZlYjIwZnItanVuZTIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTzgzRl9FR0xfVk9UX1RfMjAyMDAyMThfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-feb20fr-june2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMO83F_EGL_VOT_T_20200218_V1S2_P")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

body:
|
#
This is important, folks -- We only have _two days_ to prepare for President Trump's visit to Colorado to support our opponent, Cory Gardner. He's even holding a bigwig fundraiser that's expected to raise hundreds of thousands of dollars. (Just a picture with Trump is $25,000! What?!) So before going any further, I have to ask: **Can we count on you to add a donation to our campaign before Trump gets here? We have a real shot at flipping this seat and turning Colorado blue -- but first we need to raise $250,000 before Thursday to prepare for the incoming attacks:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200218-hick?refcode=em-200218-full&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Cory Gardner is _the most vulnerable_ Republican Senator in 2020. His approval ratings are plummeting and the polls show us ahead this November.
**That 's why Trump is hosting rallies and fundraisers to try to save his chosen candidate**. Time and again, Gardner has proven his allegiance to the president over the people of Colorado. So Trump, McConnell, and their billionaire friends will spend whatever it takes to keep their favorite yes-man in Congress.
I'm not taking a dime from corporate PACs, so the only way we can fight back against the attacks this week is with grassroots donations from folks like you. That's why I'm asking:

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: I need your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
Team–

I hope you're ready to make some change in this country, because together, we're in a position to write our nation's next chapter. But we cannot do it without your help.

A better future is not only possible – it's within reach. But Republicans are doing everything in their power to hold us back. They're obstructing the Democratic process so that they can keep pushing Trump's hateful, divisive agenda.

I should know – when I ran for governor of Georgia in 2018, I faced a nearly impossible task: overcoming systemic voter suppression by a Republican Party that silenced too many voices.

That’s why I’m reaching out today: Too much is at stake to sit on the sidelines. In every election up and down the ballot, we can reject the Trump-GOP agenda and flip red states blue, but we cannot do that without the input of dedicated supporters like you. Will you take a moment to take our official Democratic Outreach Survey to ensure Democrats can create a winning strategy, flip red states blue and stop the Trump agenda?

https://surveys.signforgood.com/DGA-abramspriorities-N?code=email|jtk6212|NN_F_RS_NL_WN&firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=1&amounts=1%2C5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250

The next elections are about us. They’re our chance to fix what is broken – and to finally kick out those who broke it.

But to claim victory on Election Day, we have a lot of work to do. We have to reach out to those who do not believe their voices matter and convince them otherwise. Because here’s the thing: Inaction can be contagious, but so can a passion for change.

With your help, we will register every last voter, get them to the polls and prove to them that elections have the power to change their lives. But, before we do that, we need your help setting our outreach strategy.

Can I count on you to take a short survey to help Democrats win important elections across the country?

http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MTY5Nzc1NTMS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=2&j=MTgyMTE3MTQzMAS2&mt=1&rt=0

Team, we can’t let this fight pass us by – not after we’ve seen what the GOP will do to win. Change starts small, but together, I know we can lead this country toward a brighter future for everyone.

Stacey Abrams

--

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

To unsubscribe from the DGA email list, click here: https://www.pages02.net/democraticgovernorsassoc/unsubscribe/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=16977553&spUserID=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&spJobID=MTgyMTE3MTQzMAS2&spReportId=MTgyMTE3MTQzMAS2 .

Paid for by Democratic Governors Association.

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic Governors Association are not tax deductible.

clean_body: Don’t Miss This: Friends, I am super excited for President Trump to visit our great state tomorrow. I can not wait to hear President Trump speak in a colosseum filled with thousands of patriotic Arizonans. Before Air Force One touches base in Arizona, I have a very special request. We want to greet President Trump with 2,000 signatures from Trump-supporting Arizonans who are excited about his visit. Don’t let President Trump down. President Trump has delivered big league for the people of Arizona. He is a man of his word, and I will always be grateful for his unwavering support of our great state. Friends, we can do this! Help me reach our signature goal for the commander-in-chief. The Clock Is Ticking. Make your voice heard → Thank you for standing with President Trump and Arizona Republicans, Tiffany Shedd Congressional Candidate for Arizona’s First Congressional District via Desktop Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee

| | I've worked with Joe for the last nine years. Tonight at the first debate and this past month, I've never seen him operate at the level he is at right now. **I've never seen him so driven, energized, excited. Why?_Because of people like you._** The people he meets on the trail. The people he gets to spend time with at the end of our events on the photo line. The hundreds of people who came out to hold signs outside of the debate hall tonight. People like you who read these emails and give us feedback and are so generous in sharing your hard-earned dollars with us. You are what drives him. **Joe is fighting like hell right now. name: Team Hagerty
subject: #TeamHagerty with Nikki Haley Follow Along on Twitter
body:
#TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox

No images? Click here https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-e-nihblk-fuutjhhtj-u/

February 18, 2020

Nikki Haley is in Tennessee today to support #TeamHagerty. You can follow along LIVE by visiting Bill Hagerty's Twitter HERE. [https://twitter.com/BillHagertyTN]

Bloomberg in Tennessee Presidential candidate Mike Bloomberg was running around Tennessee last week trying to win your votes. But we all know what he really wants is to take your guns.

Even worse, he disrespected Tennessee farmers by implying farming doesn't take intelligence. Too bad Mini Mike can't reach the pedals on a tractor. Bill Hagerty knows the value Tennessee farmers and agricultural workers bring to our economy and will fight for them in the Senate.

#TeamHagerty In The News

Mike Nieberhauser [https://www.tullahomanews.com/news/editorial/letters-to-the-editor-for-sunday-february/article_1aea0230-492a-11ea-84e7-77ec2b9b04ff.html] : [https://www.tullahomanews.com/news/editorial/letters-to-the-editor-for-sunday-february/article_1aea0230-492a-11ea-84e7-77ec2b9b04ff.html] Thanks to Bill Hagerty for standing up for President Trump [https://www.tullahomanews.com/news/editorial/letters-to-the-editor-for-sunday-february/article_1aea0230-492a-11ea-84e7-77ec2b9b04ff.html]

Thank you, Bill Hagerty, for standing up for President Trump and Christian conservative values. In the midst of this impeachment trial, Bill has been campaigning across the state, making clear his total support for President Trump. I know that if he were in the Senate right now, Bill would vote against this political sham led by Nancy Pelosi and Adam Schiff.

Jason Rich: Hagerty Will Build the Wall [https://teamhagerty.com/letter-to-the-editor-hagerty-will-build-the-wall/]

Like me, Bill Hagerty supports building the wall and stands firmly against sanctuary cities. We need to elect a United States Senator who will stand with President Trump in securing our southern border to help stop illegal immigration...Bill Hagerty is running for Senate to help President Trump build the wall and to put a stop to those coming across our border illegally. He has my support, and I implore you to consider giving yours as well.

Be a Part of #TeamHagerty TELL US WHY YOU SUPPORT BILL HAGERTY [https://teamhagerty.ivolunteers.com/Surveys/tell-us-why] DONATE TO THE CAMPAIGN [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/eoq-november?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=EOM%20Nov%202] VOLUNTEER WITH #TEAMHAGERTY [https://teamhagerty.ivolunteers.com/Register/Registration]

Early voting for 2020 Presidential Preference Primary is coming to a close next week. Make sure you cast your ballot while there's still time!

Press Highlights

Covington Leader: Bill Hagerty stopped in Covington last week – find out more about the man who hopes to replace Lamar Alexander [https://covingtonleader.com/news/election-2020/bill-hagerty-stopped-in-covington-last-week/]

Washington Examiner: Latest Nikki Haley fundraising event sure to fuel 2024 speculation [https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/news/campaigns/latest-nikki-haley-fundraising-event-sure-to-fuel-2024-speculation]

Tennessean: Former U.S. Ambassador to United Nations Nikki Haley to headline fundraiser for Bill Hagerty's U.S. Senate bid [https://www.tennessean.com/story/news/politics/2020/02/06/bill-hagerty-gop-senate-bid-nikki-haley/4669763002/]

Shelbyville Times-Gazette: Hagerty plays up Trump support [https://www.t-g.com/story/2666855.html]

What They're Saying...

"That’s why it’s very important that we send a senator to Washington, D.C., who understands how dangerous this is and who will stop the Democrats’ extremely liberal agenda.I believe that representative is Bill Hagerty, a fiscal conservative running for the United States Senate who is endorsed by President Trump."

-Kenneth Eaton [https://teamhagerty.com/letter-to-the-editor-as-us-senator-hagerty-would-fight-socialist-agenda/]

"I am supporting Bill Hagerty for Senate because he will continue fighting for family-owned farms, like mine, to ensure we have the resources necessary to compete on a global scale and win."

-Charlotte Kelley [https://teamhagerty.com/covington-leader-kelley-just-like-president-trump-bill-hagerty-will-deliver-on-his-promises-for-tennesseans/]

"Tennessee loving Bill Hagerty, who was my Tennessee Victory Chair and is now the very outstanding Ambassador to Japan, will be running for the U.S. Senate. He is strong on crime, borders & our 2nd A. Loves our Military & our Vets. Has my Complete & Total Endorsement!"

-President Donald Trump [https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1149779387077791749]

Team Hagerty

P.O. Box 150748

Nashville, TN 37215 Like https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-fb-nihblk-fuutjhhtj-o/ Tweet https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-tw-nihblk-fuutjhhtj-b/ Forward https://hfs.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-fuutjhhtj-76178D70-nihblk-l-n Preferences https://hfs.updatemyprofile.com/t-nihblk-76178D70-fuutjhhtj-p | Unsubscribe https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-u-nihblk-fuutjhhtj-x/

With only a few months to go until the primary, Teresa won’t have time for a relaxing day off – but we’re hoping you can help make today special anyway.

name: Merideth VanSant
subject: Come see us at Kamp's 1910 Cafe TODAY!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Merideth VanSant for Congress
body:
Join fellow conservatives at our meet and greet.
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001J01gNpPLsynjfoD7e4ZMA6WsxLRv6kKF2cmtAqi-47ZekbD9PhuevAXxl47qremQgvuCwDj5Uz8QCai7maZnl933LooJ-3mVhstkUf-2cM3f_RCFSKqKDf7_AHNodnGZURq9D5xNTTbn1fNwAnpnV7NcrANCPh9O&c=nkuM5lKU5h_KLEngMYhw4zJ03w21HFoJLuwUbT-Qu9oqHpY_yi3mIw==&ch=IyUfdY2YcLwe6KbuE0nhFGjfbzKsQnnv0_xGZN2P84BNnscH0_XMLw==)

| Hello!

We had a great discussion on Monday about how we can best support out veteran community. [You can watch a brief clip of our discussions below!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001J01gNpPLsynjfoD7e4ZMA6WsxLRv6kKF2cmtAqi-47ZekbD9PhuevGyASNsowG96CH_YGSR3TWoiY51dvBwL6V2GN-Nw2Q6B1GoK1Ppm4Y59OpDSrkrDP4leB38dYbUxAZxTiylcJD1XXLfQuolrGw==&c=nkuM5lKU5h_KLEngMYhw4zJ03w21HFoJLuwUbT-Qu9oqHpY_yi3mIw==&ch=IyUfdY2YcLwe6KbuE0nhFGjfbzKsQnnv0_xGZN2P84BNnscH0_XMLw==)

| I'm incredibly grateful to everyone who came out to give input and shake hands! [If you weren't able to make it out Monday, we're having another meet and greet in OKC tonight and I would very much like to see you there!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001J01gNpPLsynjfoD7e4ZMA6WsxLRv6kKF2cmtAqi-47ZekbD9PhuevG7q1C6WPDtKaTpTOK-mqFhXM4TDoYqi3RNb-pkA_LdaqrTOo2JAF9vqQBj4u-f_rNaKbRT4TWOSeKX3pMrIMq2ZTO1uSiAWng==&c=nkuM5lKU5h_KLEngMYhw4zJ03w21HFoJLuwUbT-Qu9oqHpY_yi3mIw==&ch=IyUfdY2YcLwe6KbuE0nhFGjfbzKsQnnv0_xGZN2P84BNnscH0_XMLw==)
---
| Wednesday, February 19th 6:00 p.m. - 7:00 p.m.
Kamp's 1910 Cafe 10 NE 10th St Oklahoma City, OK 73104
---
| I want to hear about the issues that matter to you and talk about our plans to take Oklahoma values all the way to DC.
[Reply to this email to RSVP.](mailto:merideth@vansantforcongress.com) (Not required, but appreciated!)
I can't wait to meet you!
Sincerely,
---
|
---
| Merideth VanSant
---
| | |
---
| ABOUT MERIDETH
---
|
---
| Merideth VanSant grew up here in Oklahoma City working at the family hardware store and lumberyard, where she learned the conservative values of hard work and community. A product of our Oklahoma public schools, Merideth was an award-winning business management consultant before starting her own successful business. A featured keynote speaker on business issues, former U.S. Delegate at the Global Entrepreneurship Summit, and co-founder of a social enterprising company that serves inner-city youth, Merideth has the commitment to community and business experience we need in Washington D.C.
She is 100% pro-life, pro-Second Amendment, pro-border security, and supports President Trump as our duly elected Commander in Chief.
---
| |
---

name: Josh Hicks for Congress
subject: Good to have you on board.
body:
Dear Friend,

Thank you for signing up to receive updates from our team at Josh Hicks for Congress. It is good to have you on board, and we look forward to keeping in touch as the campaign develops. If you have any questions or suggestions please get in touch with us at any time, by email to info@joshhicksforcongress.com or letter to PO Box 1214, Lexington, KY 40588.

This campaign is about you — your life, your concerns, and what YOU want to see from your representative. Together we can start the process of making Congress work for the people again.

Sincerely,

Josh & the team

name: Kim Mangone
subject: Priorities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Committee to Elect Kim Mangone for Congress
body:
Kevin McCarthy has made his priorities clear.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15179928/159978896/-1555887065?refcode=MAN_EM_FR_200219_Trump3_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODI4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWJlZGVjMy0zNTUzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8m7YaSO_Zxn5X0XjRERnclvlIJqa3g_CFVhLzXAbZ6c=)
---
**Kevin McCarthy has made his priorities clear** \-- instead of fighting for the people of this district, he’s fought tooth and nail to protect our corrupt president.
Instead of spending his time in the district, he’s been running across the country campaigning for OTHER Republicans.
But now that Trump wants to visit the district, he’s jetting back to tout his “accomplishments.”
What accomplishments? Voting to gut our healthcare coverage? Voting against lowering prescription drug prices? Voting against common-sense gun safety legislation?

name: Nikki Haley
subject: President Trump needs allies
body:
why I'm proud to endorse Bill Hagerty for U.S. Senate...

Peter,

The race for Tennessee’s open U.S. Senate seat is a critical chance for conservatives to send a fighter to Washington who’ll stand with President Trump.

That’s why I’m proud to announce that I’m endorsing Bill Hagerty for U.S. Senate. Can you join me in supporting Bill by donating right now? [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/haley-endorsement?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=haley%20endorsement]

STAND WITH ME – SUPPORT BILL HAGERTY

CHIP-IN $25 RIGHT NOW [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/haley-endorsement?amount=25&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=haley%20endorsement]

CHIP-IN $50 RIGHT NOW [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/haley-endorsement?amount=50&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=haley%20endorsement]

CHIP-IN $100 RIGHT NOW [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/haley-endorsement?amount=100&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=haley%20endorsement]

CHIP-IN $250 RIGHT NOW [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/haley-endorsement?amount=250&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=haley%20endorsement]

CHIP-IN ANY AMOUNT RIGHT NOW [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/haley-endorsement?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=haley%20endorsement]

Bill served as Trump’s Tennessee Victory Chair, then as a senior leader of the Trump transition team. Then, President Trump tapped him to serve as the United States Ambassador to Japan and now the President has endorsed Bill’s campaign for U.S. Senate.

President Trump NEEDS allies like Bill to keep America great. I’m asking you to join me and President Trump by supporting Bill right now. [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/haley-endorsement?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=haley%20endorsement]

Thank you for your time.

My very best,

Nikki Haley

DONATE NOW [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/haley-endorsement?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=haley%20endorsement] Team Hagerty

body:

Fellow Democrat,
The West Virginia Republican Party is proving their commitment to their hate-fueled policy agenda. The GOP recently introduced HCR 95, which targets the LGBTQ community by **PROHIBITING** the state from banning conversion therapy, **PROHIBITING** the state from** ** allowing individuals to change their gender on a driver’s license, and **PROHIBITING** the state from providing other protections for individuals who are a part of the LGBTQ community.
This **Anti-Fairness Act** , and the policy makers who drafted it, have no place in our state, and we cannot allow more hate in our hollers. That is why we are asking you to please help us fight this dangerous legislation by donating to candidates who will seek to defeat these individuals and their cruel & unusual rhetoric.
**[CLICK HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15182747/160001365/1936019941?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjg0N2Q3MS0zZDUzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g-LFmRXHdf_zs-PVv8tFRyLTpR0S4-OvItP-PImQ1Ik=)** to help defeat the Anti-Fairness Act: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/antifairness](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15182748/160001366/1936019941?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjg0N2Q3MS0zZDUzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g-LFmRXHdf_zs-PVv8tFRyLTpR0S4-OvItP-PImQ1Ik=)
We must band together to fight this evil ideology for the sake of ALL our people. It is time to let the world know that everyone is welcome in West Virginia, and we will not tolerate bigotry of any form.

name: Team Hagerty
subject: Exclusive—Trump Reinforcement on the Way from Tennessee
body:
did you see this new article from Breitbart? Peter, did you see this new article from Breitbart? Momentum is building behind our campaign and you can read all about it below: [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nikgty-fuutjhhtj-r/) **Exclusive --Trump Reinforcement on the Way from Tennessee: Bill Hagerty's Senate Race Highlights President's Takeover of GOP**By: Matthew Boyle, 18 Feb 2020President Donald Trump's former ambassador to Japan, Bill Hagerty, seems like a done deal for the GOP U.S. Senate nomination in Tennessee, as despite a handful of other challengers that are not gaining traction, Hagerty has the full support of the president and first family.What's more, Democrats are not expected to--as they did unsuccessfully last time in Tennessee against now Sen. Marsha Blackburn (R-TN)--field a serious contender like former Gov. Phil Bredesen. So that clears the way for Hagerty's rise as retiring Sen. Lamar Alexander (R-TN) heads for the exits after a long career in politics.Perhaps more interesting than the specific contours of this race--again, for which Hagerty seems like a lock on the right--is the bigger context of how this fits into the broader future of the GOP under Trump and beyond the current president.[**You can read more at Breitbart here.**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nikgty-fuutjhhtj-y/) Thank you for your time.Team Hagerty | [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nikgty-fuutjhhtj-j/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nikgty-fuutjhhtj-t/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nikgty-fuutjhhtj-i/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nikgty-fuutjhhtj-d/)

Nashville, TN 37205

Dear supporters, I am so thrilled to be speaking at my first candidate forum on Thursday, hosted by a powerful, multiracial coalition of the NAACP of Eugene/Springfield, 350 EUG, and Beyond Toxics, and focused on environmental and climate justice. I'm here to take a stand with frontline communities for our climate and work for racial justice, so I wouldn't miss this for the world -- But Congressman DeFazio will. He is in the district this week, but has refused to attend - a bad look for a 2020 Democratic primary candidate. People are saying he fears our grassroots movement's momentum, which makes sense. On Saturday we had a team of supporters reaching out at the Asian Celebration at the Lane County Fairgrounds, while canvases launched in South Eugene _and_ Corvallis, while I was talking with supporters on the coast in Florence...and we did it all again on Sunday. Our campaign is reaching more and more voters every week, and in this final quarter, every contact counts. As we approach the 90 day mark in our election countdown, things are really heating up. We need you to jump in and join us! Onward, Doyle

clean_body: | | | | Supporters at Eugene's Asian Celebration on Saturday leading the new Asian-Pacific Islanders for Canning grassroots organizing group. API supporters are invited to join the group | Dear supporters, I am so thrilled to be speaking at my first candidate forum on Thursday, hosted by a powerful, multiracial coalition of the NAACP of Eugene/Springfield, 350 EUG, and Beyond Toxics, and focused on environmental and climate justice. I'm here to take a stand with frontline communities for our climate and work for racial justice, so I wouldn't miss this for the world -- But Congressman DeFazio will. He is in the district this week, but has refused to attend - a bad look for a 2020 Democratic primary candidate. People are saying he fears our grassroots movement's momentum, which makes sense. On Saturday we had a team of supporters reaching out at the Asian Celebration at the Lane County Fairgrounds, while canvases launched in South Eugene and Corvallis, while I was talking with supporters on the coast in Florence...and we did it all again on Sunday. Our campaign is reaching more and more voters every week, and in this final quarter, every contact counts. As we approach the 90 day mark in our election countdown, things are really heating up. We need you to jump in and join us! Onward, Doyle | IN THE NEWS... Can-Do: Sunrise Eugene "While establishment politicians are invested in upholding the status quo, Canning has the conviction and energy to fight for bold, transformative policies like the Green New Deal. She will protect Oregon's forests and rivers and shake up the old boys-and-girls network that is leading us to climate disaster." - Siena Polk | ANNOUNCEMENTS | Climate change is an emergency. Environmental racism is killing people of color. Oregonians are battling a major fossil fuel company and the Trump administration which is actively trying to ram a pipeline through our backyards. Peter DeFazio refuses to even show up for this forum to discuss this. Bring your friends, your questions, and your energy on Thursday night to the first Candidate Forum of the election, focused on climate and environmental justice. *** This Thursday Feb 20th at 7PM, United Methodist Church Eugene * | | Canvassing in Corvallis, Every Week We're stepping up our game in the bluest little county in America. Join us every Saturday for canvassing in Corvallis! Never canvased before? No problem! Training and support are provided, and we promise it's not scary. Talking to voters face to face is the most important thing you can do to help this campaign win in the next few weeks. | West Coast for Canning: Seattle, SF, Oakland We are hosting fundraisers next week up and down the west coast: ; and Spread the word on social media and invite your friends and family to support Doyle. | FELLOWSHIPS! JOIN THE TEAM Your movement, your campaign, join our fellowship program today! Our Fellowship program serves two purposes: to elect new leadership in Oregon 04, and to train new leaders in electoral politics. Fellows join a scrappy network of passionate grassroots leaders. The program is open to all ages! | UPCOMING EVENTS Join us at Lane Community College as we collect voter registrations! Many young people do not know how to register, it is our job to make their voices heard! Join your fellow students as we call our neighbors to chat with them about the election and spread the word about Doyle! Free pizza will be provided! Join us as we knock doors all across the district! For specific time and location information for each event, click the button to the left! Join us at our campaign HQ as we go door to door across Eugene to help get the word out about Doyle and make sure people are register as Democrat! | YES WE CAN... | Farmers for Canning Ag Roundtable We hosted some of the Willamette Valley's finest farmers for a roundtable on agriculture and the Green New Deal. We talked about regenerative grazing, soil and water health, and supporting small and medium sized farmers to revitalize rural communities. Stay tuned for more on our platform and let us know if you're a farmer who wants to join Farmers for Canning organizing! | Over 1,000 Doors a Weekend Over the weekend, two canvassing events were hosted simultaneously in different parts of the district, and we knocked over 1,000 doors! Canvassing events are happening all the time, and they are a great way to get out and meet your neighbors while also supporting Doyle! If you've never done it before, you're not alone. First timers welcome! | Endorsement Videos Dropping Daily!** Two video endorsements have already been released from our awesome supporters, Anthony Rogers Wright and Jesus Narvaez! Keep your eyes peeled on Twitter, Instagram and Facebook as new endorsement messages will be released every day. | Doyle Canning is running for Congress in Oregon's 4th Congressional District. Doyle is rejecting all corporate PAC money in this campaign. She relies on grassroots supporters like you! "Donate to Doyle Canning" | | | Sent Via . name: VA Watch (via Team Warner)
subject: the GOP's dark 💲💲
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
While dark money in elections isn't new, the amount being spent against Virginia Democrats like Mark Warner is alarming.
|
---
| | | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d618/53d9897e/531c9cda/1c89bb35/1563037800/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ3NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-darknd?refcode=20200219_f_1_nd__476__&refcode2=graphic1&amount=5")
---
Derek,

We've got our work cut out for us in this year's election. Republicans are trying to turn Virginia red -- and they're doing it with **dark money**. Dark money is any funds spent by organizations that can take in **unlimited** amounts without disclosing their donors (think super PACs).

**While dark money in elections isn 't new, the amount being spent against Virginia Democrats like Mark Warner is alarming.** In 2018, outside organizations spent about $15 million to help Republicans in Virginia elections. **And more than $180,000 has already been spent** by pro-GOP organizations in the 2020 cycle -- and we're barely six weeks into the year!

**Will you donate to help Mark fight back against dark money attacks?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[DONATE $5](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d618/53d9897e/531c9cda/1c89bb34/1563037800/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ3NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-darknd?express_lane=true&refcode=20200219_f_1_nd__476__&refcode2=express_lane_1&amount=5")**

**[DONATE $100](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d618/53d9897e/531c9cda/1c89bb30/1563037800/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ3NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-darknd?express_lane=true&refcode=20200219_f_1_nd__476__&refcode2=express_lane_5&amount=100")**
**[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d618/53d9897e/531c9cda/1c89bb3f/1563037800/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ3NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-darknd?refcode=20200219_f_1_nd__476__&refcode2=express_lane_other")**
Mark also faces multiple Republican candidates intent on taking his Senate seat and undoing progress in the Commonwealth. Plus, the well-funded Trump Victory Initiative is pouring money into the Commonwealth to flip our state back to red.

**Bottom line, Derek: Mark 's re-election is not safe.** If we're going to keep him fighting for us in the Senate, we've got to build up campaign resources and expand our grassroots network. **[Can Mark count on you to pitch in now so he can win in November?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d618/53d9897e/531c9cda/1c89bb3e/1563037800/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ3NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-darknd?refcode=20200219_f_1_nd__476__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Team Warner

name: =?utf-8?Q?Maggie=20Brookshire?=
subject: Working on the Heidi Campaign-The Most Important Thing I Could Do
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI SLOAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Please donate $20 to fund the canvassing work that I am doing for Heidi. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/heidifor25/we-are-behind-by-76-donations-3881598?e=c169cb0a8e)
---
| | | [ ](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=fcf3c893a9&e=c169cb0a8e)
---
| | | Hi Heidi Supporters,** **

**I am one of the 180 canvassers who helped break our record** turnout for a day of door-knocking last Sunday. I have knocked on hundreds of doors for Heidi. Maybe I've knocked on your door.
**The Green New Deal was my reason for getting into politics.** I was tired of hearing the story that we can combat climate change through individual behaviors while the responsible corporations felt none of that pressure. So I started volunteering every weekend to tell folks about how Heidi will fight in Congress for climate justice.
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
| [Express Donate: $10](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=2348bf9d73&e=c169cb0a8e "Express Donate: $10")
---
| [Express Donate: $25](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=4e0a00ff0e&e=c169cb0a8e "Express Donate: $25")
---
| [Express Donate: $45](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=f871a662cf&e=c169cb0a8e "Express Donate: $45")
---
| [Express Donate: $75](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=1107924a96&e=c169cb0a8e "Express Donate: $75")
---
| Along the way I've learned about Heidi's other platforms. **It's been humbling to go from not knowing what the terms "cash bail" or "rent control" mean,** to hearing countless personal stories of how policy changes in these areas would affect people's lives.
**Recently, I was hired by the campaign as a field organizer.** I am so impressed that we raised enough money to pay for a whole team of canvassers so we can knock on doors every single day. It's been no surprise to find that folks at the door are equally impressed when I tell them how much our campaign has grown. **We're running a serious operation here, and I believe that we will win.** But that's only going to happen if we make it happen, which is why I am personally asking for you to support our paid canvassing team with a donation. [Please help sustain us through the election](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=64b90f29bd&e=c169cb0a8e) to equip organizers like me with union-printed literature, water, and living wages as we work to build a Texas for the many, not the few.
---
| In solidarity,
Maggie Brookshire
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=56a1f15e88&e=c169cb0a8e)
---

---
| | [](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=7d8d55e5b7&e=c169cb0a8e)
---
| | [](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=7b2c7d46a4&e=c169cb0a8e)

name: Dean Browning
subject: I'm on the ballot!
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
I am proud to say that I am officially the first Republican candidate to get on the ballot for this upcoming Primary Election.
Campaigns are not easy, but if we work together, we can fight through the primary and onto the general election where we can finally defeat Rep. Susan Wild.
My only job is to work for you. I want you to know that when I was a Lehigh County Commissioner, I worked overtime to ensure we had a vibrant economy where anyone willing to work hard could succeed. I want to take that work effort and bring it to the U.S. Congress.
I want Pennsylvania's 7th Congressional District to be the best place in American to live and raise a family.
I also want the United States to remain a beacon of hope and prosperity to those abroad. Please help me in this effort, Fellow Patriot.
A contribution of $100, $50, or even just $10 will go miles in supporting my campaign to be victorious in November 2020.
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Dl9kCH50TzbdujWMIXAYgFKnbM9H6cYuacgxK2waXRaNEtmcxJaGFKJLbRjvlfyFuTq3aVZnr_8-caRidq9-GGbUWgR5qdvV7EuBhBCgYtXfptAALPQ70RVu5UcBaOfNPq5WXTHnnZnJRY-EczT2dSodnvOHBlW3vbMF6zDC5WRdQUvKcOk1wg==&c=SUBPrsNjmMuCq6O1TeMEtZKVD804s3gRbMmFEEGXHzuFuXJaWs4UVw==&ch=-ZMBA7Qe6p2Q85iZ5dRVRpgMMQcHZzmCR9QKqB63PsxOlWxrVnmExg==)
---
| The job of campaigning is not easy, and, unlike Susan Wild, I rely on the support and contributions of grassroots donors like yourself.
While some campaigns are running off elitist, corporate money, I fuel our campaign dollar by dollar from hard-working Americans who believe in a brighter future. That is why I need you to chip in now so I can win in November and bring Conservative values back to our district.
Values that work for every home and every family, not just the Elite and Special Interests. Please consider donating $100, $50, or even just $25 today.
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Dl9kCH50TzbdujWMIXAYgFKnbM9H6cYuacgxK2waXRaNEtmcxJaGFKJLbRjvlfyFuTq3aVZnr_8-caRidq9-GGbUWgR5qdvV7EuBhBCgYtXfptAALPQ70RVu5UcBaOfNPq5WXTHnnZnJRY-EczT2dSodnvOHBlW3vbMF6zDC5WRdQUvKcOk1wg==&c=SUBPrsNjmMuCq6O1TeMEtZKVD804s3gRbMmFEEGXHzuFuXJaWs4UVw==&ch=-ZMBA7Qe6p2Q85iZ5dRVRpgMMQcHZzmCR9QKqB63PsxOlWxrVnmExg==)
---
| Again, Fellow Patriot, thank you for taking the time to read this email. With supporters like yourself, we can, and we will win.
For Freedom,
---
|
---
| Dean Browning Republican for Congress, PA-07
P.S. ~ Did you hear that I am the first candidate to qualify for the ballot? Together we can win this election and get Rep. Susan Wild out of Washington!
Can I count on you for a donation of $100, $50, or even just $25 to help my efforts?
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Patriot, I am proud to say that I am officially the first Republican candidate to get on the ballot for this upcoming Primary Election. Campaigns are not easy, but if we work together, we can fight through the primary and onto the general election where we can finally defeat Rep. Susan Wild. My only job is to work for you. I want you to know that when I was a Lehigh County Commissioner, I worked overtime to ensure we had a vibrant economy where anyone willing to work hard could succeed. I want to take that work effort and bring it to the U.S. Congress. I want Pennsylvania's 7th Congressional District to be the best place in American to live and raise a family. I also want the United States to remain a beacon of hope and prosperity to those abroad. Please help me in this effort, Fellow Patriot. A contribution of $100, $50, or even just $10 will go miles in supporting my campaign to be victorious in November 2020. | | | == | The job of campaigning is not easy, and, unlike Susan Wild, I rely on the support and contributions of grassroots donors like yourself. While some campaigns are running off elitist, corporate money, I fuel our campaign dollar by dollar from hard-working Americans who believe in a brighter future. That is why I need you to chip in now so I can win in November and bring Conservative values back to our district. Values that work for every home and every family, not just the Elite and Special Interests. Please consider donating $100, $50, or even just $25 today. | | | == | Again, Fellow Patriot, thank you for taking the time to read this email. With supporters like yourself, we can, and we will win. For Freedom, | | Dean Browning Republican for Congress, PA-07 P.S. ~ Did you hear that I am the first candidate to qualify for the ballot? Together we can win this election and get Rep. Susan Wild out of Washington! Can I count on you for a donation of $100, $50, or even just $25 to help my efforts? | | | == | == == | | | Dean Browning | 2432 W. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Public Credits Trump More Than Obama for Booming Economy
body:
“In the new fight between President Trump and former President Barack Obama over who did most for the economy, Gallup has an answer: Trump.” | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0b46a46981&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **_Public Credits Trump More Than Obama for Booming Economy_**

“In the new fight between President Trump and former President Barack Obama over who did most for the economy, Gallup has an answer: Trump,” Paul Bedard reports for the _Washington Examiner_.

“A solid majority” of Americans, 61 percent, gave President Trump credit for the improving economy. A full 10 percent fewer said former President Obama deserves credit.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=70b2c84bb8&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| America’s long-broken mental health system is “turning business districts into homeless camps, forcing police to run shadow mental-health systems, causing chaos for families of mentally ill adults, and driving up costs.” President Trump’s new budget proposes closing a crucial loophole—“the most important thing federal government could do to improve care for the seriously mentally ill,” D.J. Jaffe writes in [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a49c9fbf4e&e=3ee4985eea).

**MORE:** [“Donald Trump’s Fiscally Conservative Budgets”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b8890bee01&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “First Lady Melania Trump will be in Palm Beach Wednesday to accept a major honor. She has been named Palm Beach Atlantic University's 2020 Woman of Distinction. She's specifically being recognized for her contributions to the community and issues affecting children,” Victoria Lewis reports for [WPTV](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6aa92c659c&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| Hall of Fame wide receiver Jerry Rice praised President Trump yesterday for pardoning Edward DeBartolo Jr., former owner of the San Francisco 49ers. “I take my hat off to Donald Trump for what he did,” Rice told reporters on the White House's North Lawn. “Several former NFL players met with Trump on Tuesday, including Rice, Jim Brown, Ronnie Lott and Charles Haley,” Scott Gleeson reports in [_USA Today_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a2a4897d3c&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2c9953db9e&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c323192964&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=f106513051)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

body:

| | We'll cut to the chase, Peter.

**We need to raise $4,834 before the end of the day from our online supporters.[Will you donate right now to help?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890565/7f51f7bc/4dc4520b/4ef1bc51/778239460/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkzNyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200219.1nd__937__&amount=10&recurring=true")** [**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890565/7f51f7bc/4dc4520b/4ef1bc51/778239460/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkzNyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200219.1nd__937__&amount=10&recurring=true") We set our budget carefully based on weekly, monthly, and quarterly goals; this allows us to hire campaign staff, fuel MJ's travel across the state to talk to voters (she's already driven tens of thousands of miles!), and build the infrastructure we need to defeat Senator Cornyn.

With two weeks left until the primary, and early voting underway, **now is not the time to get off track.[Will you pitch in today toward the $4,834 we need to close out the day and stay on pace?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890565/7f51f7bc/4dc4520b/4ef1bc51/778239460/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkzNyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200219.1nd__937__&amount=10&recurring=true")

MJ isn't taking any money from corporate PACs, so she's relying on folks like you to power this campaign. Thanks for all that you do.**

\-- Team MJ

name: Rita Hart
subject: I’m honored

name: Adam Hattersley
subject: Major announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hattersley for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15192933/160102134/-409648012?refcode=em_fr_2020.02.19_b1_AH_all&amount=25.00&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjYxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmE4OWIxYy02NzUzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e0ENH9NcH6JDug0DWLP6YWYcc9aIo__uJUuptn8FWHo=)
---
| Hey Peter,

As a candidate, it’s easy to say that I’m for fair wages and fighting for workers’ rights. But I was raised to be more than just a man of words, but also a man of action. **And so, from the bottom of my heart I’m proud to tell you that my campaign has officially unionized.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15192934/160102135/1458161699?refcode=em_fr_2020.02.19_b1_AH_all&amount=25.00&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjYxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmE4OWIxYy02NzUzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e0ENH9NcH6JDug0DWLP6YWYcc9aIo__uJUuptn8FWHo=) Not only that, Peter, but **we are the first Florida campaign to unionize this election season!** Campaigns are powered by hard-working people who often eschew more lucrative job offers to fight to improve their country. That’s patriotism at its finest. I think it’s crucial for campaign workers, and all workers, to be able to make themselves heard and ensure they’re getting a fair shake.

Did you know, Peter, that the average hourly wage for workers hasn’t gone up since the 1980’s? I wasn’t born into money like some politicians. I know what it’s like to struggle and how hard it’s gotten to get by in our district.

**If you work hard, then you should earn a fair wage for your day’s work. And that’s why fighting for workers will always be a top priority of mine.**

If you agree with me, Peter, then I would love to have your support today to honor the unionization of this campaign
| ****[Stand with American workers →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15192935/160102136/1458161699?refcode=em_fr_2020.02.19_b1_AH_all&amount=25.00&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjYxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmE4OWIxYy02NzUzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e0ENH9NcH6JDug0DWLP6YWYcc9aIo__uJUuptn8FWHo=)****
---

Thanks for being on the side of hardworking Americans.

Adam ****
| Adam Hattersley is running to represent Florida's 15th Congressional District. To learn more, please visit [hattersleyforcongress.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15192936/160102137/1902165096?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjYxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmE4OWIxYy02NzUzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e0ENH9NcH6JDug0DWLP6YWYcc9aIo__uJUuptn8FWHo=&emci=2b55371d-4553-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=76a89b1c-6753-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=6767893)

name: Laura Loomer
subject: "a Republican would have to raise at least $3 million to win this race"
body:
The Daily Mail recently wrote a feature article about my race.

Here’s a few excerpts:
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-364891-855222-4872690-c523961c60-c940e51e1b)
Patriot,

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-364891-855222-4872690-c523961c60-c940e51e1b) The Daily Mail recently wrote a feature article about my race.

Here’s a few excerpts:

> Sid Dinerstein, a former chairman of the Palm Beach County Republicans, believes **Loomer could get swept into office on a 'red wave' carrying dozens of new Republican congressional candidates into office alongside Trump**.
>
> 'I've always thought we'd never get this district,' Dinerstein said. 'But the demographics are changing. Lois Frankel's core constituents are older Jewish residents. They're dying off and being replaced by younger Hispanics. Guess what? **Laura Loomer speaks Spanish, and she's out in the community every day. She has no fear and she has money. She's going to do well.'**
Mr. Dinerstein is absolutely correct and every day that I’m out in the community, **I’m seeing it and feeling it**.

Are you?

But the arrogance of the Democrats is working in our favor. Here’s their take in the same article:

> A Democratic Party campaign operative who asked not to be named said there's no way Frankel, a former mayor of West Palm Beach and long-time member of the state legislature, could lose her seat to Loomer.
>
> 'The demographics in that district show there's no reason for anyone to believe Lois can lose,' said the source. **'Lois is rising in the ranks and this being Trump's home district, there's no way the party will allow this seat to go**.
>
> 'Besides, **a Republican would have to raise at least $3 million to win this race, and that's not happening.'**
Watch us do it! [**Donate here and let’s prove them wrong!**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-364891-855222-4872690-c523961c60-c940e51e1b)

**We have a little under FIVE WEEKS to complete our petition drive** to get on the ballot. [**I would REALLY appreciate your support to cover the costs of our drive.**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-364891-855222-4872690-c523961c60-c940e51e1b)

While my Democrat opponent, Lazy Lois Frankel is just going to write a check for $10,000 to get on the ballot (like she’s always done), we’re taking the petition process as an opportunity to get out in the community and talk to voters and **SWITCH their voter registration from Democrat to Republican**.

And we’re doing it every . . . single . . . day!

Sure, we can be like Lazy Lois and just write a check. It’s actually LESS expensive than petitioning, BUT, we lose that opportunity to meet THOUSANDS of voters which is priceless!

**We need to raise $12,700 by the end of the week to fund the petition drive.**

It’s a lot of money, [**but if you can pitch in just $25, it will help us collect 25 petitions**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-364891-855222-4872690-c523961c60-c940e51e1b).

We need 508 people to step up and lend a hand. [**If you can donate now, you’ll be standing with 507 other patriots that helped me cross the first hurdle in this election.**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-364891-855222-4872690-c523961c60-c940e51e1b)

**And I want to recognize you!**

When you donate, there will be a check box “Yes, you can display my name. I’m proud to stand by Laura Loomer!”

Once we hit our goal, when we submit our petitions in five weeks, your name will appear on the cover letter and in the press release thanking you for funding our first battle in this election.

[**Please, let me recognize you, help me win, help me finish this petition drive strong! Donate here.**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-364891-855222-4872690-c523961c60-c940e51e1b)

Thank you again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. As I mentioned, we have to submit our petitions by March 20th! That’s just a few weeks away and my campaign volunteers and I are out petitioning every single day! But we need to cover all of the costs. From gas, printing fees and even paying for a booth at events this weekend. clean_body: The Daily Mail recently wrote a feature article about my race. Here’s a few excerpts: | | | Patriot, The Daily Mail recently wrote a feature article about my race. Here’s a few excerpts: Sid Dinerstein, a former chairman of the Palm Beach County Republicans, believes Loomer could get swept into office on a 'red wave' carrying dozens of new Republican congressional candidates into office alongside Trump. 'I've always thought we'd never get this district,' Dinerstein said. 'But the demographics are changing. Lois Frankel's core constituents are older Jewish residents. They're dying off and being replaced by younger Hispanics. Guess what? Laura Loomer speaks Spanish, and she's out in the community every day. She has no fear and she has money. She's going to do well.' Mr. Dinerstein is absolutely correct and every day that I’m out in the community, I’m seeing it and feeling it. Are you? But the arrogance of the Democrats is working in our favor. Here’s their take in the same article: A Democratic Party campaign operative who asked not to be named said there's no way Frankel, a former mayor of West Palm Beach and long-time member of the state legislature, could lose her seat to Loomer. 'The demographics in that district show there's no reason for anyone to believe Lois can lose,' said the source. 'Lois is rising in the ranks and this being Trump's home district, there's no way the party will allow this seat to go. 'Besides, a Republican would have to raise at least $3 million to win this race, and that's not happening.' Watch us do it! We have a little under FIVE WEEKS to complete our petition drive to get on the ballot. While my Democrat opponent, Lazy Lois Frankel is just going to write a check for $10,000 to get on the ballot (like she’s always done), we’re taking the petition process as an opportunity to get out in the community and talk to voters and SWITCH their voter registration from Democrat to Republican. And we’re doing it every . . . single . . . day! Sure, we can be like Lazy Lois and just write a check. It’s actually LESS expensive than petitioning, BUT, we lose that opportunity to meet THOUSANDS of voters which is priceless! We need to raise $12,700 by the end of the week to fund the petition drive. It’s a lot of money, . We need 508 people to step up and lend a hand. And I want to recognize you! When you donate, there will be a check box “Yes, you can display my name. I’m proud to stand by Laura Loomer!” Once we hit our goal, when we submit our petitions in five weeks, your name will appear on the cover letter and in the press release thanking you for funding our first battle in this election. Thank you again for all that you do. Respectfully, Laura Loomer P.S. As I mentioned, we have to submit our petitions by March 20th! That’s just a few weeks away and my campaign volunteers and I are out petitioning every single day! But we need to cover all of the costs. From gas, printing fees and even paying for a booth at events this weekend. name: Josh Hicks
subject: Welcome, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
Josh Hicks is running for Congress to represent hardworking and everyday Kentuckians, not corporations. That means he is relying only on grassroots support. Please consider making a contribution to Josh Hicks for Congress today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_hicks_footer_2019?refcode=BLU-hicks-header-link-nov&recurring=true] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/0a2cc63a-e0bd-e911-bcd0-281878391efb/41fc76d1-6a53-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWZjNzZkMS02YTUzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SXNv7pkBXlVli1ODGv0Of5XEKX65bv0MPQOF60fvuAs=&id=120613561&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com .
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_hicks_footer_2019?refcode=BLU-hicks-header-logo-nov&recurring=true [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_hicks_footer_2019?refcode=BLU-hicks-header-logo-nov&recurring=true]
Friend,
It’s pretty clear to all of us that our current political order isn’t working. Everyday Kentuckians are struggling under the leadership of people like Andy Barr, Mitch McConnell, and Matt Bevin. Our Commonwealth took an important step forward by electing Andy Beshear as governor and booting Bevin in 2019. Now we need to gear up for 2020.
Andy Barr is another career politician more concerned with getting re-elected than serving the people. That’s why I’m running for Congress. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_hicks_welcome_series?refcode=blu-jhc-welcome-1-em&amount=25&recurring=true]
I’m running for Congress to give a voice to the folks like me who believe that the political system has left them behind. We’re seeing corruption buy politics at every level – affecting everything from our healthcare to our natural resources. And I am sick of it.
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_hicks_welcome_series?refcode=blu-jhc-welcome-1-em&amount=25&recurring=true]
A little more about me – I played football at Fleming County High School and enrolled at Georgetown College, but left to spend a year as an ironworker and enlist in the US Marine Corps. After 2 deployments, I returned to Kentucky and joined the Maysville PD. I went back to school at Morehead State, then enrolled at UK College of Law and became a trial lawyer. I live in Lexington now, with my wife Bethany and our two children. You can learn more about me and why I’m running by watching our video here:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_hicks_welcome_series?refcode=blu-jhc-welcome-1-em&amount=25&recurring=true [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_hicks_welcome_series?refcode=blu-jhc-welcome-1-em&amount=25&recurring=true]
Please join me and make a donation today to help get this campaign off the ground. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_hicks_welcome_series?refcode=blu-jhc-welcome-1-em&amount=25&recurring=true]
Together we’ll end corruption in Washington.
Josh Hicks
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_hicks_welcome_series?refcode=blu-jhc-welcome-1-em&amount=25&recurring=true [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_hicks_welcome_series?refcode=blu-jhc-welcome-1-em&amount=25&recurring=true]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_hicks_welcome_series?refcode=blu-jhc-welcome-1-em&amount=25&recurring=true]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_hicks_footer_2019?refcode=BLU-hicks-footer-nov&recurring=true [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_hicks_footer_2019?refcode=BLU-hicks-footer-nov&recurring=true]
Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
Josh Hicks for Congress
PO Box 1214
Lexington, KY 40588
United States
Josh Hicks is running for Congress to be a representative who will put the needs of his constituents above his own. Josh grew up in Fleming County, before leaving to serve the country in the Marines. He then returned to Kentucky to serve his community, where he has served as a police officer and attorney. Josh wants to bring Kentucky’s values to Washington to fight for those who have no voice.
Josh is running to represent hardworking and everyday Kentuckians, not corporations. That means he is relying only on grassroots support. Please consider making a contribution to Josh Hicks for Congress today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_hicks_footer_2019?refcode=BLU-hicks-footer-link-nov&recurring=true]

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Tomorrow's emergency fundraising deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Hello -- I'm writing to ask you to make a contribution to my Senate campaign today. This is an important moment for our team -- and we need your help. Here's the situation: Donald Trump is coming to Colorado tomorrow. He's hosting a rally and a fundraiser for our opponent as a public thank you for blocking witnesses and voting to acquit him during the impeachment trial. Here's the truth: Trump will very likely attack me personally on stage tomorrow evening. Even if he doesn't, his right-wing allies will raise huge sums of money for Cory Gardner, and they'll spend it on vicious attack ads attempting to tear me down personally with lies and insults. That's why we're in the middle of an emergency fundraising drive to raise more than $250,000 online from grassroots donors before Trump takes the stage tomorrow. Each dollar helps make sure we're ready to fight back against whatever Trump and the GOP hurl at us this week. **Make a $10 donation to our campaign before Trump 's Colorado rally tomorrow. Our race is said to be the best shot Democrats have at flipping a GOP Senate seat, so your donation really matters. Chip in now:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200219?refcode=em-200219-help-full&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

[CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200219?refcode=em-200219-help-full&amount=100&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Donald Trump promised to campaign "a lot" in Colorado for my opponent, and he's making good on it. But if we're prepared, we'll be able to blunt the impact of his attacks and keep on talking about the issues that matter to folks in this state.
Thank you for standing with me,
John

Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado

name: Senator Patty Murray
subject: This is how we're going to flip the Senate, team
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
#

Team,
I launched my Sprint to 2020 program this month because this election is the most important one of our lifetimes -- and we all need to do everything we can to defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate.
The only way we can do this is if we support and help candidates in must-win Senate races across the country. Last week, you all came through to show your support for Barbara Bollier in Kansas. That's why I'm excited to introduce you to Cal Cunningham in North Carolina, Theresa Greenfield in Iowa, Dr. Al Gross in Alaska, and Rev. Raphael Warnock in Georgia. With your help, I know these four great candidates can defeat the extreme incumbent Republicans and put Senate Democrats in the majority next year.
**[Team, will you join me in supporting these exciting candidates? Pitch in $5 to support Cal, Theresa, Al, and Raphael and help them flip the Senate.](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200218-senate-slate?refcode=em200219i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
It has been absolutely horrible to watch Mitch McConnell and the GOP turn the Senate into a legislative graveyard. On issue after issue, from the climate crisis to equal pay for women and lowering prescription drug costs, no matter how important, they are refusing to even call a vote and show where they stand.
Thankfully, we have the power to end this obstruction and failed leadership in the November election. But it's going to take all of us standing with great candidates in must-win Senate races to defeat McConnell and the GOP.
**[I'm with Cal Cunningham, Theresa Greenfield, Dr. Al Gross, and Rev. Raphael Warnock in the fight to flip the Senate. Are you with us, team? Pitch in $5 now.](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200218-senate-slate?refcode=em200219i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you,
Patty

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200218-senate-slate?refcode=em200219i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**
* * *
PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let us know if you would like to [unsubscribe](https://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a69328d/22080b68/7be4ca6b/46020378/566330749/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "http://act.pattymurray.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join us today in fighting for progressive values and resisting Trump's agenda: [donate now](https://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a69328d/22080b68/7be4ca6b/4602037f/566330749/VEsD/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-emailfooter?recurring=yes").

name: Kathy Manning
subject: important update on Medicaid, Medicare, and Social Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
They're all on the chopping block.
|
---

| | Friend, I can't say that I'm surprised -- President Trump proposed his budget proposal for 2020, and it would strip funding for critical programs that North Carolinians depend on. Trump's budget would **_cut hundreds of billions_** from these programs, agencies, and initiatives: \- Affordable housing
- Children's health insurance
- The Education Department
- The EPA
- Food stamps
- Medicaid
- Medicare
- Social Security [_**SPEAK OUT: Sign our petition ->**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d35e/3d199a51/2f1ec8fd/7364eb49/3066995047/VEsH/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e200219pm") On the campaign trail in 2016 and at the State of the Union Address just days before he announced his new budget, Trump promised he wouldn't make cuts to programs like Medicare and Social Security. **Now, Trump is going back on his word to pay for his useless border wall and his tax cuts for corporations and the wealthy.** The budget is supposed to reflect our priorities and values as a country, but these are Trump's values -- not ours. [_**Add your name to say NO to Trump 's budget and demand a plan that works for North Carolinians.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d35e/3d199a51/2f1ec8fd/7364eb49/3066995047/VEsE/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e200219pm") Thank you, Kathy |

Conservative Republicans in South Mississippi tired of broken promises | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2c0f91e43353/quick-update?e=25048dcf34)
---
| | [ ](https://voterobertdeming.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3eb2be36ea02ee2ad6ed0e5d8&id=e545e69da8&e=25048dcf34)
---
| |
# Why isn't Steven Palazzo supporting President Trump on balancing the budget?

We all know that President Trump said that he could balance the budget "If we have the right people."

Unfortunately for us, our Congressman is on the Appropriations Committee and all he does is spend more money than President Trump has asked for.

Luckily for Republicans in South Mississippi who support real conservatives like State Senator Chris McDaniel, Senator Ted Cruz, and Senator Mike Lee - we have a better choice in the 2020 Republican primary that will be held on March 10.

Did you know that Biloxi has been cutting back on its public employees by hiring more contract workers in the private sector? It's called "The Deming Rule". Instead of adding more public employees and requiring more taxpayer dollars, Biloxi City Councilman Robert Deming changed how the city operates.

Wouldn't you love to have a Congressman from South Mississippi who would sponsor a bill with Senator Marsha Blackburn (a Jones County native!) that would actually CUT the federal budget??

We need a change. We need a real fiscal conservative. Robert Deming is our guy.

[**Click here now to join conservatives fed up with a Congressman who has blown up President Trump's budget, added to the Federal Deficit, and was the ONLY Congressman from Mississippi to vote for the last budget are choosing to support Robert Deming.**](https://voterobertdeming.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3eb2be36ea02ee2ad6ed0e5d8&id=02c10ebbf7&e=25048dcf34)

clean_body: A new opponent just threw his hat in the ring to run against Wilmot. | | | 📰 BREAKING NEWS 📰 A new opponent just threw his hat in the ring to run against Wilmot. We need 150 Rapid Response Donations TODAY to take on our newest challenger. Washington is broken right now because of Mitch McConnell and yes-men like Montana’s Senator Steve Daines. The only way we can end this gridlock and finally pass bills to lower the cost of prescription drugs, protect our public lands and finally address climate change is by voting obstructionist Senators like Daines out of office. We know Wilmot is the best person to defeat him and take our voices to Washington. But Wilmot is not taking a single dime from corporate PACs. He’s relying on this team of grassroots supporters -- not billionaires or special interest groups -- to make sure he has what it takes to defeat Steve Daines. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | ---|---|--- | | Thanks for being on this team, Wilmot HQ Wilmot Collins is Montana’s first black mayor, a 20+ year military Veteran, a refugee and now, a U.S. Senate candidate. Wilmot will prioritize fighting climate change, making healthcare a human right, economic opportunity, supporting our veterans, improving our public schools and keeping public lands in public hands. body:
Since we announced on Friday that Donald Trump is coming to Phoenix, we have seen an outpouring of support
**[Donald Trump is on his way to Phoenix-- donate to help Greg respond »](https://act.myngp.com/el/bQvSe31UqHK27kOq2-zKdpRfF-PkiIp92xZA2u4oMeM=/hyk4L02jOJQDOJByite7mJoJr3NMfNlPU-9gnhXpjPo=?refcode=X_021620_TrumpInAZ_C&amount=50&recurring=auto)**

We have already seen an outpouring of support from folks all across Arizona who are ready to support a better way forward for our state.

**It is clear, Arizona voters want to elect leaders like Greg who will work hard for _us_ , and not for _special interests_.**

That's why we have organized our [**FLIP MARICOPA COUNTY FUND**](https://act.myngp.com/el/bQvSe31UqHK27kOq2-zKdpRfF-PkiIp92xZA2u4oMeM=/hyk4L02jOJQDOJByite7mJoJr3NMfNlPU-9gnhXpjPo=?refcode=X_021620_TrumpInAZ_C&amount=50&recurring=auto) to support Greg, Captain Mark Kelly, and Democrats who are committed to serving the needs of Arizona families.

[**DONATE HERE TO FLIP MARICOPA COUNTY >>>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/bQvSe31UqHK27kOq2-zKdpRfF-PkiIp92xZA2u4oMeM=/hyk4L02jOJQDOJByite7mJoJr3NMfNlPU-9gnhXpjPo=?refcode=X_021620_TrumpInAZ_C&amount=50&recurring=auto)

Thank you!

\-- _Team Stanton_

[](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc4b7/2a380d31/2275334e/f0f049/1219195657/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0c2ciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMDIxOV9NYWluZVBvbGwxX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4sg?refcode=e20200219_MainePoll1_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=auto")

name: Allen Chen, Campaign Manager
subject: Houston Chronicle: “We see Kulkarni as the strongest possible candidate for Democrats hoping to turn the seat blue”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/nlY_XNzfQLh0nLgqJHzwRVxmPe4ENnE61mMnqUChtuE=/50YhTXHuQ-8YX6ey9hnIOeFUOHGQJkDT1ire_WHOR_o=?refcode=20200219&amount=25&recurring=1)
---
Team,

If you haven't heard the news, we've got another major endorsement: _The Houston Chronicle_!

The Chronicle knows Sri is the best chance we've got at flipping this seat and bringing progress to Texas' 22nd District, and we need your help to do so.

We're just 13 days from the primary, and to hit our online fundraising goal and ensure that we don't face a runoff, we _have_ to hit our goal. **[Can you make a contribution of any amount, friend?](https://act.myngp.com/el/nlY_XNzfQLh0nLgqJHzwRVxmPe4ENnE61mMnqUChtuE=/50YhTXHuQ-8YX6ey9hnIOeFUOHGQJkDT1ire_WHOR_o=?refcode=20200219&amount=25&recurring=1)** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Chip in: $22](https://act.myngp.com/el/nlY_XNzfQLh0nLgqJHzwRVxmPe4ENnE61mMnqUChtuE=/50YhTXHuQ-8YX6ey9hnIOeFUOHGQJkDT1ire_WHOR_o=?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=20200219)** **[Chip in: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/nlY_XNzfQLh0nLgqJHzwRVxmPe4ENnE61mMnqUChtuE=/50YhTXHuQ-8YX6ey9hnIOeFUOHGQJkDT1ire_WHOR_o=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20200219)** **[Chip in: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/nlY_XNzfQLh0nLgqJHzwRVxmPe4ENnE61mMnqUChtuE=/50YhTXHuQ-8YX6ey9hnIOeFUOHGQJkDT1ire_WHOR_o=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20200219)** **[Chip in: $250](https://act.myngp.com/el/nlY_XNzfQLh0nLgqJHzwRVxmPe4ENnE61mMnqUChtuE=/50YhTXHuQ-8YX6ey9hnIOeFUOHGQJkDT1ire_WHOR_o=?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=20200219)** **[Or, chip in another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/nlY_XNzfQLh0nLgqJHzwRVxmPe4ENnE61mMnqUChtuE=/50YhTXHuQ-8YX6ey9hnIOeFUOHGQJkDT1ire_WHOR_o=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=20200219)** Here's my favorite part of the whole piece: "But for all his global perspective -- he says he speaks six languages well -- Kulkarni impressed us with his commitment to help people in his district."

It's truly Sri's commitment to this community that will make him an incredible leader in Congress, and I'm proud to be on Team Sri.

All our hard work comes down to what happens on March 3rd -- but early voting has already begun, so if you're ready to flip this seat, get to an early voting location _today_ (and bring your family, friends, and neighbors along, too!)

Thank you for being with us in the fight for progress,

Allen Chen
Campaign Manager | **** | ****[CHIP IN ⇨](https://act.myngp.com/el/nlY_XNzfQLh0nLgqJHzwRVxmPe4ENnE61mMnqUChtuE=/50YhTXHuQ-8YX6ey9hnIOeFUOHGQJkDT1ire_WHOR_o=?refcode=20200219&amount=25&recurring=1)****
